title: Raw select/textarea/input migrations, tooltip consistency, and CommandPalette accessibility
description: Continuation of the systematic UI improvement loop. This batch replaces remaining raw <select> elements in TemplateBar, NewEventForm, and TimezoneSelector with shadcn Select, replaces raw <textarea> elements in MarkdownEditor and PrepSection with shadcn Textarea, replaces raw <input> in OfferEditableCell with shadcn Input, migrates native title= tooltip attributes in DashboardToolbar/ContactCard/FeedbackWidget to shadcn Tooltip, and adds aria-label to CommandPalette search input.

userStories.title: Replace TemplateBar raw <select> with shadcn Select
userStories.description: As a developer, TemplateBar uses a raw <select> with a SELECT_CLS constant for styling. Replace with the shadcn Select component.
acceptanceCriteria: Read src/components/TemplateBar.jsx first

If raw <select> exists with SELECT_CLS or similar manual styling, replace with <Select value={...} onValueChange={...}><SelectTrigger><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent>{options.map(o => <SelectItem key={o.value} value={o.value}>{o.label}</SelectItem>)}</SelectContent></Select>
Import Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem from src/components/ui/select
Remove SELECT_CLS usage from this file if no longer needed
If the file already uses shadcn Select, mark passes: true with note 'already using shadcn Select'
npm run build passes with no errors
userStories.notes: Read the file before editing. TemplateBar likely renders a template picker dropdown. shadcn Select uses onValueChange (not onChange). The SelectTrigger width should match the existing select width — pass className to SelectTrigger if needed.

userStories.title: Replace NewEventForm raw <select> (AppSelector) with shadcn Select
userStories.description: As a developer, NewEventForm contains an application selector using a raw <select> element. Replace with shadcn Select.
acceptanceCriteria: Read src/components/NewEventForm.jsx first
If raw <select> exists for application selection, replace with shadcn Select using the same options array
Import Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem from src/components/ui/select
Controlled value and onChange behavior preserved (use onValueChange)
If the file already uses shadcn Select, mark passes: true with note 'already using shadcn Select'
npm run build passes with no errors
userStories.notes: Read the file before editing. The application selector maps application objects to options. shadcn Select value must be a string — if the value is an object id, use the id string as the value. Preserve any empty/placeholder option as a SelectItem with value=''.

userStories.title: Replace MarkdownEditor raw <textarea> with shadcn Textarea
userStories.description: As a developer, MarkdownEditor uses a raw <textarea> with inline Tailwind classes instead of the shadcn Textarea component.
acceptanceCriteria: Read src/components/MarkdownEditor.jsx first
If raw <textarea> exists with manual className, replace with <Textarea> from src/components/ui/textarea
Preserve all existing props: value, onChange, onKeyDown, placeholder, rows, ref, className (pass through)
If the file already uses shadcn Textarea, mark passes: true with note 'already using shadcn Textarea'
npm run build passes with no errors
userStories.notes: Read the file before editing. The Textarea component at src/components/ui/textarea.jsx already exists and uses React.forwardRef. Pass any custom className — the component merges it via cn(). Preserve resize-none or other layout classes.

userStories.title: Replace PrepSection raw <textarea> with shadcn Textarea
userStories.description: As a developer, PrepSection uses a raw <textarea> with a TEXTAREA_CLS constant for styling. Replace with shadcn Textarea.
acceptanceCriteria: Read src/components/PrepSection.jsx first
If raw <textarea> with TEXTAREA_CLS or manual className exists, replace with <Textarea> from src/components/ui/textarea
Remove TEXTAREA_CLS usage from this file if no longer needed
If the file already uses shadcn Textarea, mark passes: true with note 'already using shadcn Textarea'
npm run build passes with no errors
userStories.notes: Read the file before editing. Preserve all props: value, onChange, placeholder, rows. If TEXTAREA_CLS is only used in PrepSection, remove both the import and the constant after replacing.

userStories.title: Replace OfferEditableCell raw <input type='text'> with shadcn Input
userStories.description: As a developer, OfferEditableCell uses a raw <input type='text'> with INPUT_CLS styling. Replace with shadcn Input.
acceptanceCriteria: Read src/components/OfferEditableCell.jsx (or wherever the editable cell input lives — may be in OfferComparison.jsx)
If raw <input type='text'> exists with INPUT_CLS or manual className, replace with <Input> from src/components/ui/input
Preserve all existing props: value, onChange, onBlur, onKeyDown, type, className (merge with cn())
If the file already uses shadcn Input, mark passes: true with note 'already using shadcn Input'
npm run build passes with no errors
userStories.notes: Read the file before editing. The Input component at src/components/ui/input.jsx already exists. Merge any layout-specific className via cn(). OfferEditableCell is likely a small component — check src/components/OfferEditableCell.jsx first, then OfferComparison.jsx if not found there.

userStories.title: Add aria-label to CommandPalette search input and replace with shadcn Input
userStories.description: As a developer, CommandPalette has a raw <input type='text'> search field with no aria-label. Replace with shadcn Input and add the label.
acceptanceCriteria: Read src/components/CommandPalette.jsx first
If raw <input type='text'> exists for search, replace with <Input> from src/components/ui/input
Add aria-label='Search commands' (or appropriate label) to the Input
Preserve all existing behavior: value, onChange, onKeyDown, autoFocus, placeholder
If the file already uses shadcn Input, just add aria-label if missing
npm run build passes with no errors
userStories.notes: Read the file before editing. The command palette search is the main input at the top of the modal. Adding aria-label is the key accessibility fix. The Input component spreads all HTML input props so aria-label will be forwarded correctly.

userStories.title: Migrate native title= tooltip attributes to shadcn Tooltip in DashboardToolbar, ContactCard, FeedbackWidget
userStories.description: As a developer, DashboardToolbar, ContactCard, and FeedbackWidget use native title= attributes for tooltips. Replace with the shadcn Tooltip component for consistent UX.
acceptanceCriteria: Read src/components/DashboardToolbar.jsx — replace any title='...' on buttons with <Tooltip><TooltipTrigger asChild>{button}</TooltipTrigger><TooltipContent>{label}</TooltipContent></Tooltip>
Read src/components/ContactCard.jsx — same pattern for all title= attributes
Read src/components/FeedbackWidget.jsx — same pattern
Import Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent from src/components/ui/tooltip
Remove the title= attribute after wrapping with Tooltip
If any file already uses shadcn Tooltip for all tooltips, mark that file as no-change-needed
npm run build passes with no errors
userStories.notes: Read each file before editing. The project already has a TooltipProvider wrapping the app (added in a prior PRD). Import Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent from src/components/ui/tooltip. Use asChild on TooltipTrigger to avoid wrapping in an extra span. Only replace title= attributes — don't restructure the components otherwise.

userStories.title: Replace TimezoneSelector raw <select> with shadcn Select (with SelectGroup)
userStories.description: As a developer, TimezoneSelector uses a raw <select> with <optgroup> elements for timezone groups. Replace with shadcn Select using SelectGroup and SelectLabel.
acceptanceCriteria: Read src/components/TimezoneSelector.jsx first
If raw <select> with <optgroup> elements exists, replace with shadcn Select using <SelectGroup> and <SelectLabel> for each group
Import Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectGroup, SelectLabel, SelectItem from src/components/ui/select
Value and onValueChange behavior preserved
If the file already uses shadcn Select, mark passes: true with note 'already using shadcn Select'
If TimezoneSelector.jsx does not exist, mark passes: true with note 'file not found'
npm run build passes with no errors
userStories.notes: Read the file before editing. This is the most complex Select migration because of the grouped timezone structure. Map each <optgroup label='...'> to <SelectGroup><SelectLabel>{label}</SelectLabel>{options}</SelectGroup>. The SelectContent may need a max-height for the long timezone list — add className='max-h-60 overflow-auto' to SelectContent if not default.
